mapper.select:
SELECT rp.id_ as id, rp.deployment_id_ as deploymentId, rd.name_ as name, rd.category_ as category, rp.key_ as flowKey, rp.version_ as version, rp.suspension_state_ as suspensionState, rd.deploy_time_ as deploymentTime FROM ACT_RE_PROCDEF rp LEFT JOIN ACT_RE_DEPLOYMENT rd ON rp.deployment_id_ = rd.id_ JOIN (select KEY_ , MAX(VERSION_) as version from ACT_RE_PROCDEF group by KEY_) as t ON rp.KEY_ = t.KEY_ AND rp.VERSION_ = t.VERSION
and rd.name_ like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
order by rd.deploy_time_ desc
select id_ from ACT_RE_DEPLOYMENT where name_ = #{name} order by ID_ desc limit 1
select DEPLOYMENT_ID_ from ACT_RE_PROCDEF where KEY_ = #{key} order by VERSION_ desc limit 1
